calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Matthew B. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Alfonza Phillips, Sr., who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Waldron, Duffy, Inc.
Default entered against defendant on September 11, 2006.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Alfonza Phillips, and against the Defaulted Defendant, Walfron, Duffy, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $335.224.00.
Prejudgment Interest - To Be Determined.
Costs - To Be Determined.
Total Judgment - $335,224.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
